violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -10 pound raw beef tubes and raw pork loin stored above ready-to-eat bone-in ham in walk-in cooler by meat room.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Repackaged cold noodle salads are labeled more than 10 days in advance.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
